name: Oriental Pistachio Chicken
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken breasts with garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
2. Heat saute chicken in oil over medium-high heat until cooked through.
3. In a saucepan, combine beef broth, cornstarch, wine, and oyster sauce. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in chopped green onions and pistachios.
5. Cook rice noodles according to package directions.
6. Place noodles in heated serving dish. Top with chicken breasts and pour sauce over all.
7. Garnish with additional pistachios, if desired.
